meeting: Post Quantum Transaction Signature (PQTS) Breakout #4 - January 2025

ephemeral_key_rotation.highlight: Ephemeral key rotation via account abstraction: rotate signer per transaction
Attack window reduced to ~12 seconds (or less on L2s)
Implementation deployed on Base Sepolia; adds <100K gas overhead
Live demo available at nicetry.xyz; ERC-7579 modules published

frame_transactions.highlight: Frame transactions (EIP-8141): native account abstraction targeting Hegotá
Frames enable protocol introspection; three modes: default, verify, sender
Sender field required in transaction; validation fully user-defined
Per-frame receipts address 4337 UX complaint of jumbled logs
Signature aggregation compatibility: verify frame data aliased for future ZK/aggregation

post_quantum_readiness.highlight: Frame transactions agnostic to PQ algorithm; allows user/wallet choice
Falcon supports key recovery mode (ecrecover-like) per Section 3.12
Labrador aggregation for Falcon signatures published today on ethresear.ch
Hegotá opportunity: bundle PQ precompile with frame transactions

organizational.highlight: Telegram chat created for ongoing PQTS discussions
Next call in two weeks: hardware wallet focus

action_items.action: Integrate ephemeral rotation with frame transactions design
Frame transaction breakout call planned before next ACD
Review EIP-8197 (CADEX) for signature stripping compatibility

decisions.decision: Verify frame data aliased from introspection to enable future aggregation
Approve opcode restricted to frame.target caller only
Implicit ordering: sender approval must precede payer approval

targets.target: Frame transactions testnet deployment: next few weeks
